{{CargoRelic
|name=C++- From Hello World to Goodbye Cruel World
|class_id=20853
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The only book where the segmentation faults teach you life lessons! Features:
Memory leaks that mirror your existential dread
Template metaprogramming to numb your soul
[404's Notes]
if (code_works) {dont_touch_it(); } else { blame_python(); }
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=29
|ss1=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +100<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +10<br>Gaia Tech Pts: 60000/60000
|ss2=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +200<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +20<br>Gaia Tech Pts: 60000/60000
|ss3=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +300<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +30<br>Gaia Tech Pts: 60000/60000
|ss4=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +300<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +30<br>Gaia Tech Pts: 60000/60000
|ss7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +300<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +30<br>Gaia Tech Pts: 60000/60000<br> (Awakened)
}}
